chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-327 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on CMA No.1778/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No.1510/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Aijaz Ali Shar, Advocate for the petitioner.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent Application is granted. 2 to4. Heard learned counsel for the petitioner. Perusal of prayer clause made in petition reflects that there is controversy in between the parties which cannot be decided without recording evidence. Hence, the petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
